chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 494 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on MA No.4167/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 24.10.2024 None present for the applicant nor any intimation is received. It is now 12:05 pm; no one has turned up to pursue the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
